creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is a list of directly referenced dependencies, where are the
overwriting functions?

p5-NetAddr-IP:
only in ports

p5-Archive-Tar:
5.8.9: not included
5.10.1: 1.52
5.12.2: 1.54
ports: 1.68

p5-Net-DNS:
only in ports

p5-Compress-Zlib:
5.8.9:  not included
5.10.1: 2.020
5.12.2: 2.024
ports:	2.015

p5-IO-Zlib:
5.8.9:  not included
5.10.1: 1.09
5.12.2: 1.10
ports:	1.10

p5-HTML-Parser:
only in ports

p5-IO-Compress:
5.8.9:  not included
5.10.1: 2.020
5.12.2: 2.024
ports:	2.015

p5-Test-Harness:
5.8.9:  2.64
5.10.1: 3.17
5.12.2: 3.17
ports:	3.22

p5-libwww:
only in ports

p5-Encode-Detect:
only in ports

p5-Mail-Tools:
only in ports

p5-Time-HiRes:
5.8.9:  1.9715
5.10.1: 1.9719
5.12.2: 1.9719
ports:	1.9721

p5-Mail-SPF:

p5-IO-Socket-INET6:

p5-IO-Socket-SSL:

p5-DBD-mysql:
only in ports

p5-DBD-Pg:
only in ports

p5-Digest-SHA1:
only in ports

p5-Digest-SHA:
5.8.9:  not included
5.10.1: 5.47
5.12.2: 5.47
ports:	5.48

p5-Mail-DKIM:
only in ports

p5-Crypt-OpenSSL-RSA:
only in ports

p5-IP-Country:
only in ports

The only one I can see with a lower version is p5-Compress-Zlib.
Btw. maybe p5-Time-HiRes can be omitted at all?
